title: BLD21-03502-6056 Warehouse TI
project_name: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE
summary: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE - B,DIV.2 - VACANT. **ELECTRONIC SUBMITTAL - PIONEER PROGRAM TO INTERWEST** III-N.NR THIS PROJECT IS BEING PHASED Scope includes all seismic upgrades required for existing 71,355 SF vacant building at 3625 Cincinnati Ave, Rocklin, CA. Seismic upgrades will include: new braces frames; new columns/foundations to strengthen roof framing; re-nail roof diaphragm; connections between roof member throughout building; strengthening of the 4x12’s and Glu-Lams; additional roof to wall connections; improve panel to panel connections; frame in existing mechanical openings; new openings and infill at existing openings; dry rot repairs at roof. Included in this package are Building Envelope improvements including: complete roof replacement with TPO roof and insulation; parapet details for updated south parapet to meet code distance requirement from adjacent building; replacement and/or addition of scuppers, downspouts and overflows; exterior window replacement; infill and new Openings at existing concrete wall for tenant improvement floor plan; and infill at the niche between the existing 1979 building and the 1986 addition. LRA - NO WUI FULLY SPRINKELED PLACER COUNTY FIRE P.D. . **SPECIAL INSPECTIONS REQUIRED - SEE APPROVED AGREEMENT FOR DETAILS** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REV1 ENGINEER JUDGEMENT FOR FIRE RATING OF JOINT ASSEMBLY AT EXTERIOR CONCRETE PANELS - FINAL REVIEW BY INTERWEST 03/22/2022. -BH - Warehouse TI

title: BLD20-02755-5993 Electrical
summary: KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE - Project consists of working with PG&E to go underground with our electrical service from their pole to our house. Existing electric transformer is across Ridge Road from our house. The new pole will be planted on our property on the house-side of Ridge Road so no trenching under Ridge Road is necessary. The new pole will be placed in the existing PG&E easement on our property, so no new easements are required. From that pole, we will trench ~170 feet to our house, ending at the location of our existing electric panel. The old 200A meter main will be removed, the new meter main will be upsized to 400A. The trench is multi-purpose, it will include both electric and telephone (no gas). CURRENT PANEL AMPERAGE: 200 PROPOSED PANEL AMPERAGE:N- 400A SPLIT N- 1-200A W/ E-100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL TO TRANSFER SWITCH 2ND 200A BRK DERATED TO 175A W/60A E-PV W/ 100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL CHANGE OUT / NEW: Change Out - Upgrade WITH PORTABLE GENERATOR AND EXISTING SOLAR PERMIT # BLD18-04691 ****-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REVISION 6/24/21: CHANGING MSP FROM 400A TO 200A FOR SERVICE TO HOUSE - REVIEWED RM - Electrical
full_text: KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE. KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE - Project consists of working with PG&E to go underground with our electrical service from their pole to our house. Existing electric transformer is across Ridge Road from our house. The new pole will be planted on our property on the house-side of Ridge Road so no trenching under Ridge Road is necessary. The new pole will be placed in the existing PG&E easement on our property, so no new easements are required. From that pole, we will trench ~170 feet to our house, ending at the location of our existing electric panel. The old 200A meter main will be removed, the new meter main will be upsized to 400A. The trench is multi-purpose, it will include both electric and telephone (no gas). summary: PG&E ROCKLIN SEISMIC + BUILDING ENVELOPE UPGRADES PACKAGE - B,DIV.2 - VACANT. **ELECTRONIC SUBMITTAL - PIONEER PROGRAM TO INTERWEST** III-N.NR THIS PROJECT IS BEING PHASED Scope includes all seismic upgrades required for existing 71,355 SF vacant building at 3625 Cincinnati Ave, Rocklin, CA. Seismic upgrades will include: new braces frames; new columns/foundations to strengthen roof framing; re-nail roof diaphragm; connections between roof member throughout building; strengthening of the 4x12’s and Glu-Lams; additional roof to wall connections; improve panel to panel connections; frame in existing mechanical openings; new openings and infill at existing openings; dry rot repairs at roof. Included in this package are Building Envelope improvements including: complete roof replacement with TPO roof and insulation; parapet details for updated south parapet to meet code distance requirement from adjacent building; replacement and/or addition of scuppers, downspouts and overflows; exterior window replacement; infill and new Openings at existing concrete wall for tenant improvement floor plan; and infill at the niche between the existing 1979 building and the 1986 addition. LRA - NO WUI FULLY SPRINKELED PLACER COUNTY FIRE P.D. . **SPECIAL INSPECTIONS REQUIRED - SEE APPROVED AGREEMENT FOR DETAILS** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REV1 ENGINEER JUDGEMENT FOR FIRE RATING OF JOINT ASSEMBLY AT EXTERIOR CONCRETE PANELS - FINAL REVIEW BY INTERWEST 03/22/2022. -BH - Warehouse TI

title: AREA: R01:  Fence
summary: AREA: R01: Fence - I am wanting to re-build the front section of my fence where the gate is to my side yard. My total height would be 8 feet. This is to address a 4 ft grade difference causing direct visibility into the backyard. A large section of my backyard is graded up 4 feet. So you can see into my yard. This is strictly for privacy. It will be a 6’ fence with a 2’ lattice top. It is a very small section. The only part that will be 8 feet is about 88” from the house to the upper graded area. I have a bulk pickup scheduled Monday 5/4. And am hopefully planning on doing project 5/2/26. Thank you for your time on this matter. - Repairs, including Replacing Windows or Siding, Fire, or other repairs

title: KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE
summary: KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE - Project consists of working with PG&E to go underground with our electrical service from their pole to our house. Existing electric transformer is across Ridge Road from our house. The new pole will be planted on our property on the house-side of Ridge Road so no trenching under Ridge Road is necessary. The new pole will be placed in the existing PG&E easement on our property, so no new easements are required. From that pole, we will trench ~170 feet to our house, ending at the location of our existing electric panel. The old 200A meter main will be removed, the new meter main will be upsized to 400A. The trench is multi-purpose, it will include both electric and telephone (no gas). CURRENT PANEL AMPERAGE: 200 PROPOSED PANEL AMPERAGE:N- 400A SPLIT N- 1-200A W/ E-100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL TO TRANSFER SWITCH 2ND 200A BRK DERATED TO 175A W/60A E-PV W/ 100A BRK TO E-125A SUB PANEL CHANGE OUT / NEW: Change Out - Upgrade WITH PORTABLE GENERATOR AND EXISTING SOLAR PERMIT # BLD18-04691 ****-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- REVISION 6/24/21: CHANGING MSP FROM 400A TO 200A FOR SERVICE TO HOUSE - REVIEWED RM - Electrical
full_text: KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE. KOPP - UNDERGROUND ELECTRICAL SERVICE - Project consists of working with PG&E to go underground with our electrical service from their pole to our house. Existing electric transformer is across Ridge Road from our house. The new pole will be planted on our property on the house-side of Ridge Road so no trenching under Ridge Road is necessary. The new pole will be placed in the existing PG&E easement on our property, so no new easements are required. From that pole, we will trench ~170 feet to our house, ending at the location of our existing electric panel. The old 200A meter main will be removed, the new meter main will be upsized to 400A. The trench is multi-purpose, it will include both electric and telephone (no gas).
